import json
import traceback
import re
from datetime import datetime, date

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, DataFrame
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, TimestampType
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    current_timestamp,
    expr,
    to_timestamp,
    lit,
    input_file_name,
)

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

# Entity and date settings
entity_name = "appeal-s78"
storage_entity = "appeal-s78"
date_folder = "2026-03-18"

spark: SparkSession = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

storage_account: str = mssparkutils.notebook.run(
    "/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account"
)

# Use today if date_folder is empty
date_folder = (
    datetime.now().date().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    if date_folder == ""
    else date_folder
)

source_path = (
    f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}"
    f"ServiceBus/{storage_entity}/{date_folder}/"
)

# ========================================
# STEP 1: RENAME FILES using mssparkutils.fs.ls() ✅
# ========================================
print("=== STEP 1: Renaming files with colons to underscores ===")

# ✅ Synapse-native file listing
files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_path)

files_with_colon = [f for f in files if ":" in f.name and f.name.endswith(".json")]

print(f"Found {len(files_with_colon)} JSON files with colons")

for file_info in files_with_colon:
    old_path = file_info.path
    old_filename = file_info.name
    
    # Replace : with _ in filename only
    new_filename = old_filename.replace(":", "_")
    new_path = old_path.replace(old_filename, new_filename)
    
    print(f"Renaming: {old_filename} -> {new_filename}")
    
    # Copy content and rename
    mssparkutils.fs.cp(old_path, new_path)
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(old_path)

print("=== File rename complete ===")

# ========================================
# STEP 2: Load schema and read JSON files
# ========================================
print("=== STEP 2: Loading schema and reading JSON ===")

schema = mssparkutils.notebook.run(
    "/py_create_spark_schema",
    30,
    {"db_name": "odw_standardised_db", "entity_name": entity_name},
)

spark_schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(schema)) if schema != "" else ""
start_exec_time = datetime.now()

# Read ALL JSON files in the folder (now all have underscores)
reader = spark.read.option("multiline", "true")
if spark_schema:
    reader = reader.schema(spark_schema)

raw_df = reader.json(source_path)
print(f"Loaded {raw_df.count()} rows from {source_path}")

# Add metadata columns
raw_df = (
    raw_df.withColumn("expected_from", current_timestamp())
    .withColumn("expected_to", expr("current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY"))
    .withColumn("ingested_datetime", to_timestamp("message_enqueued_time_utc"))
    .withColumn("input_file", input_file_name())
)

print("Raw DataFrame ready!")
print("Schema:")
raw_df.printSchema()
# raw_df.show(5, truncate=False)

from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from datetime import datetime

# ===============================
# CONFIG
# ===============================
storage_entity = "appeal-has"
entity_name = "appeal-has"

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

storage_account = mssparkutils.notebook.run("/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account")

source_base = f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}/ServiceBus/{storage_entity}/"
target_base = f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}/ServiceBuss_Spark35/{entity_name}/"

print("SOURCE BASE:", source_base)
print("TARGET BASE:", target_base)


# ===============================
# List folders and detect date folders
# ===============================
def is_date_folder(name: str) -> bool:
    try:
        datetime.strptime(name, "%Y-%m-%d")
        return True
    except:
        return False


def list_files_recursive(path):
    all_files = []
    try:
        items = mssparkutils.fs.ls(path)
    except:
        return []

    for item in items:
        if item.isDir:
            all_files.extend(list_files_recursive(item.path))
        else:
            all_files.append(item)
    return all_files


# ===============================
# FIND DATE FOLDERS
# ===============================
print("=== Scanning for date folders ===")

top_level_entries = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_base)

date_folders = [e.name for e in top_level_entries if e.isDir and is_date_folder(e.name)]

print(f"Found date folders: {date_folders}")


# ===============================
# PROCESS EACH DATE FOLDER
# ===============================
for date_folder in date_folders:

    source_root = source_base + date_folder + "/"
    target_root = target_base + date_folder + "/"

    print(f"\n=== Processing date folder: {date_folder} ===")
    print("SOURCE:", source_root)
    print("TARGET:", target_root)

    # create target date folder
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(target_root)

    # list all nested files
    files = list_files_recursive(source_root)

    json_files = [f for f in files if f.name.lower().endswith(".json")]

    print(f"JSON files found: {len(json_files)}")

    for file_info in json_files:

        old_path = file_info.path
        old_name = file_info.name

        # rename filename only
        new_name = old_name.replace(":", "_")

        # compute relative nested path
        relative_path = old_path.split(f"/{storage_entity}/{date_folder}/", 1)[1]
        subfolder_path = relative_path.replace(old_name, "")

        # ensure folder exists in target
        final_target_dir = target_root + subfolder_path
        mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(final_target_dir)

        target_path = final_target_dir + new_name

        print(f"\nCOPY & RENAME:\n  FROM: {old_path}\n  TO:   {target_path}")

        mssparkutils.fs.cp(old_path, target_path)

print("\n=== COMPLETED: All date folders processed (originals kept) ===")
